channel.title: Gurdeep Singh on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Gurdeep Singh on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: kade pattian di gal...
item.description:
An awesome poetry. I don’t know the name of the writer. Gurdeep Singh sung this in his second album Hook. The whole album is a must listen. Awesome poetry and voice !

kade pattian gi gal kade tahnian di gal sanu das ja ni vaaye sade hanian di gal kade pattian di gal…

kade soorjan ton puchan kade tarian ton puchan maruthal te jhana de kinarian ton puchan koi dasda na lang chukke panian di gal kade pattian di gal…
